title: nasturtium majus
intro: Nasturtium majus, also known as tall nasturtium or garden nasturtium, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright flowers and edible leaves and flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as respiratory infections and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nasturtium majus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
